generated_note: Machine-readable protection-surface contract. Each surface maps a public pyveil Channel to synthetic fixtures and a reproducible verification command. A surface is 'verified' only when it has policy support, at least one synthetic fixture, and a passing verification command. Do not mark a surface 'verified' without fixture evidence.

capabilities: Redact high-precision EMAIL, PHONE, CREDIT_CARD, and credential shapes in user, RAG, or application context before it reaches a model.
constraints: High-precision detectors only; not full PII recall.
Unknown names and addresses require CustomRule or an upstream NER system.
surfaces.security_boundary: Application-to-model. No network egress; deterministic scoped HMAC placeholders.

capabilities: Redact sensitive values a model echoes before the output is displayed or chained into another step.
constraints: Does not evaluate model output for correctness, safety, or prompt injection.
surfaces.security_boundary: Model-to-consumer. Applied after the model call, before display or chaining.

capabilities: Redact PII in model-controlled tool arguments and fail closed on credentials (AUTH_HEADER, PRIVATE_KEY, API_KEY, JWT, KV_SECRET, URL_QUERY_SECRET) by raising BlockedSensitiveData.
constraints: Fail-closed blocking applies only to the default credential set; extend via Policy.override.
Cannot infer application-specific identifiers without CustomRule.
surfaces.security_boundary: Model-to-tool. Credentials block before a tool executes.

capabilities: Redact sensitive values in nested tool output before it returns to the model, preserving JSON structure and non-sensitive fields.
constraints: Redacts rather than blocks by default so tool output can still be summarized.
surfaces.security_boundary: Tool-to-model. Applied to tool output before it re-enters context.

capabilities: Redact sensitive values in MCP resource payloads, including token-bearing URLs, before content enters agent context.
constraints: Operates on the payload pyveil receives; it does not fetch or authenticate MCP resources.
surfaces.security_boundary: Resource-to-agent. Applied to resource content before context assembly.

capabilities: Redact sensitive values before text is embedded or persisted to a memory store.
constraints: Placeholders are stable within a scope; use distinct scopes to avoid cross-tenant linkage.
surfaces.security_boundary: Application-to-store. Applied before embedding or persistence.

capabilities: Redact sensitive values in span attributes before they leave through telemetry, while passing non-sensitive attributes through unchanged.
constraints: Does not instrument tracing; the caller applies pyveil to attribute values.

capabilities: Redact sensitive values in log messages, including malformed JSON-shaped payloads, before records reach handlers or external sinks.
constraints: Malformed JSON falls back to text redaction and returns a string.
surfaces.security_boundary: Application-to-sink. Applied before log handlers run.
